U

ukkonenscsfinder - package ukkonenscsfinder
 
UkkonenSCSFinder - Class in ukkonenscsfinder
An implementation of Esko Ukkonen's linear time algorithm for finding approximate shortest common superstrings.
UkkonenTrieNode - Class in trienodes
UkkonenTrieNode is a subclass of ACTrieNode which adds functionality (depth, supporters, bfsSuccessor) to the superclass in order to enable the use of Ukkonens Algorithm.
UkkonenTrieNode(LanguageParameter, boolean, char) - Constructor for class trienodes.UkkonenTrieNode
 
UkkonenTrieNodeFactory - Class in trienodes
Creates UkkonenTrieNodes, which support the implementation details needed for Ukkonens Linear Time SCS Finder.
UkkonenTrieNodeFactory() - Constructor for class trienodes.UkkonenTrieNodeFactory
